The Equalizer 3 (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $92,373,751Details
International Box Office $98,693,809
Worldwide Box Office $191,067,560
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,593,375
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,828,911
Total $10,422,286
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Since giving up his life as a government assassin, Robert McCall has struggled to reconcile the horrific things he’s done in the past and finds a strange solace in serving justice on behalf of the oppressed. Finding himself surprisingly at home in Southern Italy, he discovers his new friends are under the control of local crime bosses. As events turn deadly, McCall knows what he has to do: become his friends’ protector by taking on the mafia.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$34,604,229 (37.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.67 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,965 opening theaters/3,965 max. theaters, 5.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $100,986,293

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 1st, 2023 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 30th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
August 30th, 2023 (Wide) (Italy)
August 31st, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
August 31st, 2023 (Wide) (Germany)
August 31st, 2023 (Wide), released as The Equalizer 3: The Final Chapter (New Zealand)
Video Release: October 3rd, 2023 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R strong bloody violence and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2796 (cert #54240), 8/16/2023)
Running Time: 103 minutes
Franchise: The Equalizer
Filming location (country): Italy
Geographical setting: Italy
Plot point: Mafia, Vigilante
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Action Thriller

Genre:Action

Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Since giving up his life as a government assassin, Robert McCall has struggled to reconcile the horrific things he’s done in the past and finds a strange solace in serving justice on behalf of the oppressed. Finding himself surprisingly at home in Southern Italy, he discovers his new friends are under the control of local crime bosses. As events turn deadly, McCall knows what he has to do: become his friends’ protector by taking on the mafia.
